payload.long_description: Close-up view of a partially cropped dark glossy side table corner showing a rounded top edge and vertical side panel; appears to be lacquered or painted wood with reflective highlights and minor scuffing, edge-cropped in the narrow vertical frame and likely photographed at about 0.4 m distance.
